name: create-sound
abstract: Generate a SoundDefinition for @litlab/audx from any input - a natural-language prompt, an audio file the user shares, or both. Use when the user says "create a sound", "/create-sound", "design a sound for X", shares a WAV/MP3/sprite, or asks to reverse-engineer a sample. Optionally renders a WAV preview and round-trip-validates the result.
